summary: Iteration 7 testing complete - All 24 marketing agency agents + 1 dev agent verified. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified including Agent Manager squads, search, hands-free mode with canvas visualizer, and 'Mordomo Virtual' branding.
critical_code_review_comments: AGENT_TEMPLATES correctly contains 25 templates (24 marketing + 1 coder)
All 8 squads properly defined in AgentManager.js SQUADS array
POST /api/agents/from-template/{template_id} correctly creates agents from templates
HandsFreeMode.js has canvas-based AudioVisualizer with 3 rings circular spectrum
Dark blue background (#020810) correctly applied to hands-free mode
Agent Manager search functionality filters templates correctly
Icons like Shield, Handshake are imported and mapped in ICON_MAP
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 added 24 marketing agency agents organized by 8 squads. Key test points: 1) GET /api/agents returns 25 templates. 2) POST /api/agents/from-template/{id} creates agents (tested orion, nova, midas, dash). 3) Agent Manager shows squads: Core & Governance, Data & Diagnostics, Traffic & Performance, Funnel & Sales, Creative & Messaging, Pages & Conversion, Research & Product, Reporting & Finance, Sistema, Geral. 4) Search filters templates. 5) Hands-free mode shows 'Mordomo Virtual' title with canvas visualizer (3 rings, volume-reactive). 6) Background #020810 (dark blue). 7) Sidebar shows 'Mordomo Virtual'. 8) Login page shows 'Mordomo Virtual AI' subtitle.

notes.agent_templates: 25 total templates: 24 marketing agency agents + 1 general purpose coder
notes.squads: 8 marketing squads + Sistema + Geral = 10 squad categories in UI
notes.visualizer: Canvas-based AudioVisualizer with 3 concentric rings, volume-reactive animation using Web Audio API
notes.branding: Tool renamed to 'Mordomo Virtual' - visible in sidebar, hands-free mode, and login page subtitle
